title: thelypteris esquirolii var. glabrata
intro: Thelypteris esquirolii var. glabrata, also known as the Chinese maidenhair fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of T. esquirolii var. glabrata include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in water or decocting them in a tea, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
